button.title: Button
button.description: Every variant, color, size, shape, animate slot, loading, upload, block, active state.

animate.label: Animate snippet
animate.fixedLabel: Fixed width — locked to wider snippet

avatar.title: Avatar
avatar.description: User thumbnails with text fallback, image, icons, badges, loading, history ring, typing indicator, and grouping with overflow counter.

text.label: Text fallback
text.hint: Strings up to 5 characters render verbatim; longer strings split on whitespace and take the initials.

card.title: Card
card.description: All six variants and named snippets (img, title, body, buttons, interactions).

imgSize.label: Custom imgSize
imgSize.description: The `imgSize` prop overrides the image cell's main dimension per variant — square edge for compact, left column for horizontal, max-height for vertical variants. Accepts a number (px) or any CSS length.

withButtons.label: Comment form
withButtons.description: Card composed as a chat-style comment input — title, image, and a single bottom row with the kit's Input next to an icon-only send button.

alert.title: Alert
alert.description: Two-variant feedback strip. Relief is the default; gradient adds a diagonal hue-shifted overlay. Supports icon, title, footer, closable, collapsible, and paged content.

checkbox.title: Checkbox
checkbox.description: Every state, every color, label position, custom checked icon, group (multi-select array binding).

group.label: Array group (bind:group)
group.description: Multi-select via a shared array. Each checkbox contributes its `value` token.

radio.title: Radio
radio.description: Every color, state, label position, custom icon, native group selection.

segmented.title: Segmented
segmented.description: Single-choice radio group rendered as a sliding-thumb segmented control. Variants, icons, sizes, per-item color, full keyboard support.

basic.label: Basic
basic.hint: Bind a value, pass labelled items, get a smooth-sliding indicator.

variants.label: Variants
variants.hint: `default` — gray-2 track with an accent thumb. `tonal` — accent-tinted track. `border` — outlined track, no fill. `relief` — sunken track with a raised thumb.

icons.label: With icons
icons.hint: Each item accepts an `icon` snippet rendered before the label.

iconOnly.label: Icon-only
iconOnly.hint: Skip the label to render compact icon-only segments — provide `ariaLabel` for SR users.

theme.label: Theme switcher
theme.hint: Common drop-in for app-wide theme controls.

sizes.label: Sizes
sizes.hint: Three preset scales — small, medium (default), large.

colors.label: Colors
colors.hint: Group `color` paints the whole group; per-item `color` overrides only that segment — active label and click-ripple bloom follow the pressed item's color.

block.label: Block
block.hint: `block` stretches the group to fill the container with equal segments.

disabled.label: Disabled
disabled.hint: Disable per-item or the whole group at once.

options.label: API
options.items: Array of `{ value, label?, icon?, disabled? }`.
options.color: Palette name or CSS color — drives the active label, thumb tint, glow and focus ring.
options.block: Stretch to container width with equal-share segments.

switch.title: Switch
switch.description: Pill or square track, three sizes, every color, on/off icons or labels, ghost-knob mode, indeterminate, loading, disabled.

thumbColor.label: Custom thumb color
thumbColor.description: Pass `thumbColor` to tint the knob independently of the track. Combine with `color` for two-tone switches.

thumbColorStates.label: Thumb color per state
thumbColorStates.description: Use `thumbColorOff` and `thumbColorOn` to crossfade the knob between two colors as the switch toggles.

timing.label: Custom animation timing
timing.description: Override `transitionDuration` (ms) and `transitionEasing` (a `(t: number) => number` function from `svelte/easing` or your own) to retune the toggle motion. Defaults: 240ms cubicOut.

input.title: Input
input.description: Every label style, every state color, every variant, icon (before / after), password reveal, progress bar, loading, message slot.

message.label: Message slot
message.error: Please enter a valid email address.

tooltip.title: Tooltip
tooltip.description: Placements, variants, hover/click triggers, interactivity, delay, loading.

divider.title: Divider
divider.description: Thin separator line. Horizontal or vertical, dashed / dotted, optional inline label, color and thickness.

pagination.title: Pagination
pagination.description: Numeric / dot modes, infinite, progress, ellipsis jumps, disabled / loading items.

select.title: Select
select.description: Single / multiple, filter, option groups, chips with collapse, state colors.

openAnim.label: Open animation
openAnim.description: Pick the dropdown panel motion. `pop` (default) is a snappy back-out scale; `slide` drops in from above; `fade` is a flat opacity tween; `spring` overshoots with elastic-out; `stagger` pops the panel and flies the rows in one after another.

caret.label: Custom caret icon
caret.description: Pass a `caret` snippet to replace the default chevron. The snippet receives `isOpen` so it can rotate or swap glyphs.

custom.label: Custom option slot
custom.description: Use the `option`, `selected` and `groupTitle` snippets to render rich rows — tinted icons, multi-line content, badges. Behaviour stays default; only presentation changes.

customMulti.label: Custom slots — multi
customMulti.description: Same `option` and `groupTitle` snippets, plus a `chip` snippet for the trigger pills.

menu.title: Menu
menu.description: Anchored popup with a flexible trigger slot. Click / hover / manual open modes, six placements, click-outside / Esc close.

hover.label: Hover trigger
hover.hint: Open on pointer enter, close after a short grace window when leaving anchor and popup.

custom.label: closeOnSelect = false (manual close)
custom.hint: Items don't auto-dismiss the menu. Useful for theme pickers or multi-step actions.

manual.label: Manual control
manual.hint: `triggerOn="manual"` lets you drive `open` from the outside — the trigger snippet still acts as the visual anchor for positioning.

block.label: Block anchor
block.hint: `block` makes the anchor wrapper stretch to its parent — useful inside a flex / grid cell.

openAnim.label: Open animation
openAnim.description: Pick the popup motion via the `openAnim` prop. `pop` (default) is a snappy back-out scale; `slide` drops in from the anchored edge; `fade` is opacity-only; `spring` overshoots with elastic-out.

timing.label: Custom timing
timing.description: Override `openDuration` (ms) and `openEasing` (any CSS easing string — `cubic-bezier(...)`, `ease`, `linear`, etc.) to retune any variant. Defaults pick a sensible duration/curve per `openAnim`.

dialog.title: Dialog
dialog.description: Modal dialog built on the native <dialog> element. Header / body / footer snippets, size preset, persistent mode, focus-trap and scroll-lock handled for you.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Imperative `notify(...)` API that mounts toasts via NotificationsHost. Six anchor positions, sticky, closable, loading, custom icon, click handler.

chip.title: Chip
chip.description: Compact tag, filter, and selection element. Shares Button's variant vocabulary, scale, focus ring, and ripple — chips and buttons read as the same family.

active.label: Active state
active.hint: Click to toggle. Filter / selection chips reuse `active` and announce as `aria-pressed`.

harmony.label: Alongside Input & Button
harmony.hint: Same surface palette, same focus accent, same radius rhythm — the form, action, and tag layer compose into one input row.

scrollbar.title: Scrollbar
scrollbar.description: Themed, auto-hiding scrollbars applied kit-wide via base styles. Two pieces wire it up: tokens.css sets scrollbar-color on every element from three CSS variables, and <ScrollbarHost> — mounted once at the app root — toggles [data-scrolling] on whatever element is being scrolled so the variables can swap between idle and active.

default.label: Default — wire-up
default.hint: Import ScrollbarHost from the kit and mount it once at your app root. It installs a single capture-phase scroll listener and toggles [data-scrolling] on the element that emitted the event; tokens.css picks up the attribute and swaps the thumb color. The kit-wide host is already in +layout.svelte — the second mount in this example is a no-op (module-level guard) and exists only to make the contract readable.

liveState.label: Live [data-scrolling]
liveState.hint: Same default container with a MutationObserver mirroring the attribute that ScrollbarHost flips. Scroll the box to watch the pill go on, then back off ~1s after the last scroll event — proves the JS/CSS handshake.

alwaysVisible.label: Always visible
alwaysVisible.hint: Override --scrollbar-thumb with a visible color when discoverability matters more than minimalism. The auto-hide swap to --scrollbar-thumb-hover still fires while scrolling.

brand.label: Brand-tinted active state
brand.hint: Override --scrollbar-thumb-hover to tint the active-state thumb with a kit color token. Rest state stays transparent so the surface reads clean when idle.

track.label: Tinted track
track.hint: Override --scrollbar-track to give the trough a subtle background — useful when the surface needs a clear scroll affordance even at rest.

horizontal.label: Horizontal axis
horizontal.hint: scrollbar-color is axis-agnostic — the same three variables retint the horizontal scrollbar too. ScrollbarHost listens to all scroll events, so the active-state swap fires identically.

variables.label: All variables
variables.hint: Override on :root for a global change, on any container for a scoped change.
variables.thumb: Thumb color at rest. Transparent enables auto-hide.
variables.thumbHover: Thumb color while the container is being scrolled (or 1s after).

ripple.title: Ripple
ripple.description: GPU-composited click bloom packaged as a Svelte action. Drop on any host element with use:ripple — installs its own scoped stylesheet on first use, cleans up on destroy.

basic.label: Basic
basic.hint: use:ripple with no options uses the kit primary color.

colors.label: Colors
colors.hint: Pass color as a kit palette name or any CSS color string — the ripple inherits the accent.

solidBg.label: Solid background
solidBg.hint: Set solidBg: true when the host's background already IS the accent color (filled buttons). Lifts the disc body so the wave reads against the surface.

disabled.label: Disabled
disabled.hint: disabled: true skips ripple emission entirely without removing the listener.

textColor.label: Text color shift
textColor.hint: Host text animates to textColor during the bloom (default rgb(var(--on-accent)) — matches the kit's text-on-accent token, same as Button's default variant) and back on settle.

surfaces.label: Arbitrary surfaces
surfaces.hint: Ripple respects the host's border-radius — works on cards, circles, anything.

options.label: Options
options.color: Accent color for this ripple. Palette name or CSS color string.
options.solidBg: Lift the disc body so the wave doesn't blend into a host that's already the accent color.
options.textColor: Colour the host text animates to during the bloom. Defaults to rgb(var(--on-accent)) — kit's text-on-accent token. Pass 'currentColor' to disable the shift.

list.title: List
list.description: Surface for vertical item collections — palette-aware, sized, dividers, sections, listbox selection.

listbox.label: Listbox (single)
listbox.hint: Arrows / Home / End for keyboard nav.

progress.title: Progress
progress.description: Linear or circular progress with indeterminate, stripes, custom thickness, and palette colors.

inputNumber.title: Input Number
inputNumber.description: Numeric stepper with min/max/step, long-press auto-repeat, focus ripple, and the kit's size / shape / palette contract.

textarea.title: Textarea
textarea.description: Multi-line input with all the same variants/states/labels as Input. Auto-grow available.

autoGrow.label: Auto-grow
autoGrow.placeholder: I grow with what you type…

slider.title: Slider
slider.description: Single value or `[start, end]` range. Three sizes, tooltip on hover/focus, optional ticks, value formatter, palette colors.

timePicker.title: DateTime Picker
timePicker.description: Input field with a dropdown wheel picker. Manual typing, cyclic hour/minute/second wheels, optional 12-hour mode, customizable icon side and glyph.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.description: Inline month grid powered by Temporal. Single-day or range selection, full keyboard navigation, locale-aware labels.

restricted.label: Min / max + disabled days
restricted.hint: Min Apr 5, max Apr 25, weekends disabled

transparent.label: Transparent variant
transparent.hint: Drops the calendar's background so it inherits the surface it sits on — handy inside Card, Dialog or any custom panel.

dates.title: Date utilities
dates.description: Pure helpers built on Temporal.PlainDate / PlainTime / PlainDateTime — exported from sveltastic-ui and shared by Calendar and the picker family.

parsing.label: Parsing & ISO conversion
parsing.hint: Coerce strings, native Date, and Temporal types into the kit's plain shapes — and back to ISO strings safe to bind to inputs.

formatting.label: Locale formatting
formatting.hint: All formatters delegate to Intl.DateTimeFormat — labels follow the user's locale.

locale.label: Locale helpers
locale.hint: Resolve the host locale, decide week start (Sun vs Mon) and 12h/24h time without hard-coded lists.

types.label: Public types
types.hint: Re-exported from the kit barrel — use them on your own state.

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: Reactive singleton that owns the kit's light/dark and RTL state. Persists to localStorage and respects the user's prefers-color-scheme on first load.

current.label: Current state
current.hint: Both fields are rune-backed — read them anywhere and the UI re-renders on change.

controls.label: Controls
controls.hint: Try these — the entire docs site reacts to the singleton.

api.label: API
api.themeField: Current theme. Updates trigger reactive UI changes.
api.setTheme: Set theme, mirror to <html data-theme>, persist to localStorage.
api.setRtl: Set direction flag, mirror to <html dir>.
api.hydrate: Read stored theme + prefers-color-scheme on mount. Call once from your root layout.

usage.label: Usage
usage.hint: Mount once, then read or mutate from anywhere.

upload.title: Upload
upload.description: Drag-and-drop / click file picker with preview list, multi-select, accept / size / count validation, and per-file thumbnails.

basic.label: Single file
basic.label2: Drag a file here, or click to browse

imagesOnly.label: Images with preview
imagesOnly.label2: Drop images — preview shows up automatically
imagesOnly.hint: PNG, JPG, WEBP up to 5 MB each

withFiles.label: With files
withFiles.description: Selected items rendered as a list with thumbnails for images, type icons for everything else, formatted size and a remove button.

customItem.label: Custom item snippet
customItem.description: Override the row entirely via the `item` snippet — render any layout you need.

validation.label: Validation
validation.label2: Drop a non-image, or anything > 100 KB

tabs.title: Tabs
tabs.description: Composition tabs — `<Tabs>` provider, `<TabList>` + `<Tab>` for triggers, `<TabPanel>` for content. Place them anywhere in the template, not necessarily adjacent. The rail shares its visual contract with `<Segmented>`: spring-animated thumb, press-scale, ripple-into-thumb.

basic.label: Basic
basic.hint: Default `underline` variant — animated bottom bar follows the active tab.

variants.label: Variants
variants.hint: `underline` · `default` · `tonal` · `border` · `relief` — mirrors `<Segmented>` for the four filled looks plus the classic underline.

sizes.label: Sizes
sizes.hint: Shared scale with Button and Segmented — `xl` · `large` · `medium` · `small` · `mini`.

block.label: Block
block.hint: `<TabList block>` stretches to fill its container; tabs distribute evenly.

composition.label: Decoupled layout
composition.hint: Triggers in the header, panels in the main area — separated by other markup.

keyboard.label: Keyboard nav
keyboard.hint: Arrow Left/Right (or Up/Down), Home/End move focus and activate.

cardPanels.label: Card panels
cardPanels.hint: `panelVariant="card"` wraps panel content in a kit Card-style surface.

composed.label: Reusing kit
composed.hint: Panels can host any kit component — `<Card>`, `<Avatar>`, `<Chip>`, `<List>`.

panes.overviewBody: An at-a-glance summary of your project.
panes.previewBody: A live render of the current selection.

collapse.title: Collapse
collapse.description: Single accordion item with seven variants, sizes, icon + extra slots, and a CollapseGroup wrapper for single / multiple expansion.

basic.label: Basic
basic.body: Click the header to expand or collapse this panel. Bind `open` to control it from outside.

composed.label: Composed with kit components
composed.profileBody: Senior product designer based in Lisbon. Eight years in fintech UX, currently leading the design system rewrite.
composed.actionBody: Two pull requests are waiting on your review. The CI run finished 14 minutes ago without regressions.

group.cardLabel: Group — card (shared surface with title + footer)
group.cardFooter: Need more help? Reach out to the support team.
group.a1: Refunds are processed within 14 days of the request. Items must be unused and in their original packaging — keep the receipt or order id handy.
group.q2: How do I update my profile?
group.a2: Open Settings → Account. Email and avatar are editable inline; password rotation requires reauthentication.
group.q3: Where can I see my invoices?
group.a3: Billing → Invoices. PDFs are generated within an hour of payment and stay available for seven years.
